full_response:
Because we are asked for the space-time coordinates of event  

E₂ : “Knight #2 crosses his own starting line”  

as measured in Knight #2’s inertial frame, we attach the spatial origin of that frame to Knight #2 himself and set the zero of his clock at the instant he leaves the line.  By this choice

• Knight #2 remains at x₂ = 0 for all proper time.  
• The crossing event is the instant we define as t₂ = 0.

Hence, in Knight #2’s frame  

 x₂ = 0  and  t₂ = 0.

\boxed{(t_{2},\,x_{2})_{\,\text{Knight\;#2}} = (0,\;0)}  

Confidence: 33%
